REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (408 Vicksburg Street, San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Thomas Lucas.

The sale was confirmed at $750,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $506,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
